expected_behavior: Clicking Checkout should either proceed to a checkout flow with the current cart contents, or if the cart is empty, prevent checkout. An order should not be charged without a non-empty cart and explicit confirmation.
observed_behavior: After clicking Checkout, the page shows an order (ord_1ae75ed0) with "Total charged: $12.50" while the cart simultaneously says it is empty. No payment or confirmation steps were shown.
reproduction_steps: Open the home page of Demo Shop.
Click "Add to cart" on Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
Observe that the cart reads "Your cart is empty" while an order box shows a charged order totaling $12.50 and no checkout steps were presented.
title: Order charged despite empty cart and no checkout flow
